name: XPay Payment Gateway API
description: Nexi XPay payment gateway API for e-commerce payments including hosted payment pages, pay-by-link, 3-step payments, card verification, Google Pay, back-office operations (refunds, captures, cancellations), and disputeless hospitality features.
